name: Joey West // Blood play
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Kinktober day 7

You and Joey hated each other. He always tried picking fights with you and he didn’t even try to hide the fact he was clearly enjoying your anger.

You two were of course fighting again and it seemed like Joey had the upper hand. Though instead of trying to really win the fight, he kissed you…

_____________________________

I almost forgot to post this today, sorry gang 😔

I hope this is good for blood play. I’m not too familiar with it and I didn’t want to do something super extreme as that’s not what I personally like to write 🙁

When I looked up blood play for inspiration I saw some crazy things to say the least.. There was more than just blood to see in most of those videos so I’m not going back there ever again I think 😀 not trying to kink shame anyone though, was just surprised with the things I saw

Also, I decided to put the definitions of my kinktober bots public anyway 😓 I personally don’t always like it when they’re hidden so I can’t continue doing it to you guys. I mostly did it as I was (still am) embarrassed by the little effort I put into them compared to my usual bots 😭

creator: Brickyard
